BOARD-MINUTES-2025-04.text:
Northwind Trading Co SAS
MINUTES OF THE MEETING OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS
14 Rue du Commerce, 75015 Paris, France
====================================================================
Reference: BOARD-MINUTES-2025-04
Date: 8 April 2025    Venue: Registered Office, Paris
Present: Sneha Iyer (Managing Director, Chair), Aditya Deshpande (Finance
         Controller), Rohan Sharma (Operations Head), and directors.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
1. Approval of Annual Operating Plan FY 2025-26

The Board reviewed and approved the annual operating plan and procurement
budget of €4.2 million for FY 2025-26. The single-signature payment approval
limit for managers was reaffirmed at €25,000.00; amounts at or above this
threshold require co-signature by the Finance Controller.

Signed: ______________________     ______________________
        Sneha Iyer, Chair          Aditya Deshpande, Finance Controller

BOARD-MINUTES-2025-05.text:
Northwind Trading Co SAS
MINUTES OF THE MEETING OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS
14 Rue du Commerce, 75015 Paris, France
====================================================================
Reference: BOARD-MINUTES-2025-05
Date: 14 May 2025    Venue: Registered Office, Paris
Present: Sneha Iyer (Managing Director, Chair), Aditya Deshpande (Finance
         Controller), Rohan Sharma (Operations Head), and directors.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
2. Banking Resolution

RESOLVED that the BNP Paribas current account (****8842) continue as the
principal operating account. Cheque / SEPA signatories: Managing Director and
Finance Controller jointly for amounts above €100,000.

Signed: ______________________     ______________________
        Sneha Iyer, Chair          Aditya Deshpande, Finance Controller

BOARD-MINUTES-2025-06.text:
Northwind Trading Co SAS
MINUTES OF THE MEETING OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS
14 Rue du Commerce, 75015 Paris, France
====================================================================
Reference: BOARD-MINUTES-2025-06
Date: 11 June 2025    Venue: Registered Office, Paris
Present: Sneha Iyer (Managing Director, Chair), Aditya Deshpande (Finance
         Controller), Rohan Sharma (Operations Head), and directors.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
3. Warehouse Lease Renewal

The Paris warehouse & office lease was renewed for 24 months at a
monthly rent of €165,000. Operations Head authorised to execute the deed.

Signed: ______________________     ______________________
        Sneha Iyer, Chair          Aditya Deshpande, Finance Controller

BOARD-MINUTES-2025-07.text:
Northwind Trading Co SAS
MINUTES OF THE MEETING OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS
14 Rue du Commerce, 75015 Paris, France
====================================================================
Reference: BOARD-MINUTES-2025-07
Date: 16 July 2025    Venue: Registered Office, Paris
Present: Sneha Iyer (Managing Director, Chair), Aditya Deshpande (Finance
         Controller), Rohan Sharma (Operations Head), and directors.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
4. Q1 Review

Q1 FY26 revenue of €3.1 million noted, marginally ahead of plan. The Finance
Controller reported a duplicate vendor payment caught in weekly reconciliation
and reversed via credit note; controls deemed adequate.

Signed: ______________________     ______________________
        Sneha Iyer, Chair          Aditya Deshpande, Finance Controller

BOARD-MINUTES-2025-08.text:
Northwind Trading Co SAS
MINUTES OF THE MEETING OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS
14 Rue du Commerce, 75015 Paris, France
====================================================================
Reference: BOARD-MINUTES-2025-08
Date: 20 August 2025    Venue: Registered Office, Paris
Present: Sneha Iyer (Managing Director, Chair), Aditya Deshpande (Finance
         Controller), Rohan Sharma (Operations Head), and directors.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
5. Capital Expenditure - Packaging Line Upgrade

RESOLVED that capital expenditure of €250,000.00 for a semi-automatic carton
sealing & packaging line from Trident Chemicals (Vendor V-020) is APPROVED,
to be executed under PO-77001 in September 2025. Proposed by the Operations
Head, seconded by the Finance Controller. Carried unanimously.

Signed: ______________________     ______________________
        Sneha Iyer, Chair          Aditya Deshpande, Finance Controller

BOARD-MINUTES-2025-11.text:
Northwind Trading Co SAS
MINUTES OF THE MEETING OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS
14 Rue du Commerce, 75015 Paris, France
====================================================================
Reference: BOARD-MINUTES-2025-11
Date: 19 November 2025    Venue: Registered Office, Paris
Present: Sneha Iyer (Managing Director, Chair), Aditya Deshpande (Finance
         Controller), Rohan Sharma (Operations Head), and directors.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
6. H1 Performance & Credit Policy

Half-year results reviewed. The Board approved extending 30-day credit terms
to two new distribution customers subject to credit checks.

Signed: ______________________     ______________________
        Sneha Iyer, Chair          Aditya Deshpande, Finance Controller

BOARD-MINUTES-2026-01.text:
Northwind Trading Co SAS
MINUTES OF THE MEETING OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS
14 Rue du Commerce, 75015 Paris, France
====================================================================
Reference: BOARD-MINUTES-2026-01
Date: 13 January 2026    Venue: Registered Office, Paris
Present: Sneha Iyer (Managing Director, Chair), Aditya Deshpande (Finance
         Controller), Rohan Sharma (Operations Head), and directors.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
7. Headcount & Budget Reforecast

The Board noted the reforecast for H2 FY26 and approved backfilling two
operations roles. HR to complete onboarding documentation for new joiners.

Signed: ______________________     ______________________
        Sneha Iyer, Chair          Aditya Deshpande, Finance Controller

BOARD-MINUTES-2026-03.text:
Northwind Trading Co SAS
MINUTES OF THE MEETING OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS
14 Rue du Commerce, 75015 Paris, France
====================================================================
Reference: BOARD-MINUTES-2026-03
Date: 24 March 2026    Venue: Registered Office, Paris
Present: Sneha Iyer (Managing Director, Chair), Aditya Deshpande (Finance
         Controller), Rohan Sharma (Operations Head), and directors.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
8. Year-End & Statutory Audit Appointment

The Board resolved to appoint Dubois & Associés, Statutory Auditors,
for the FY 2025-26 statutory audit and directed management to prepare books
for review.

Signed: ______________________     ______________________
        Sneha Iyer, Chair          Aditya Deshpande, Finance Controller
